    "S-trap is siphon-prone and prohibited under plumbing code",
    "Trap seal loss risk allows sewer gas entry into occupied space"

  "actions": [
    "Remove S-trap and replace with approved P-trap configuration",
    "Provide proper venting per IPC/UPC venting requirements",
    "Re-inspect after correction before closing out rough"
  ],
  "rationale": "S-traps are explicitly prohibited by IPC/UPC because the downward leg can self-siphon, destroying the trap seal and allowing sewer gases to enter the building. The observed rough installation is therefore non-compliant and defective.",

    "IPC 1002.3 / UPC 1003.3 - Prohibited traps (S-traps)",
    "IPC 1002.2 / UPC 1003.2 - Trap seal protection"
  ]
}
